name: DDGS Chatbot
description: Extracts specific answer sentences from DuckDuckGo search results using intelligent filtering
author: Kasam

valves.label: Max Search Results
valves.description: Maximum number of search results to process

valves.label: Exclude Questions
valves.description: Exclude sentences that end with question marks (true/false)

valves.label: Exclude Query Matches
valves.description: Exclude sentences that contain the original query (true/false)
